Middleware reference resolution: unknown names error with the known list,
and unreferenced declarations warn.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.1.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

//fabrik:cli:middleware name=confirm
func Confirm(next cli.Handler) cli.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:cli:middleware name=lonely
func Lonely(next cli.Handler) cli.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:cli:middleware name=orphan
func Orphan(next cli.Handler) cli.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:cli:command middleware=ghost,lonely,phantom
func Migrate(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command middleware=confirm
func Status(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }
-- want/diags --
warning: shared/shared.go:11:1: CLI middleware "orphan" is declared but never referenced
  help: reference it with middleware= or remove the declaration
error: shared/shared.go:14:1: unknown CLI middleware "ghost"
  help: known: confirm, lonely, orphan
error: shared/shared.go:14:1: unknown CLI middleware "phantom"
  help: known: confirm, lonely, orphan
